en.title: PDFs to ZIP
en.metaDescription: Package multiple PDFs into a ZIP archive. Compress and bundle PDF files.
en.description:
PDFs to ZIP packages multiple PDF files into a single ZIP archive. Compress and bundle your PDFs for easier sharing, storage, or backup.

The tool creates a compressed archive containing all your PDF files, reducing total size and simplifying file management.

All processing happens in your browser, ensuring your files remain private.

howToUse.title: Upload PDFs
howToUse.description: Drag and drop multiple PDF files or click to select.

howToUse.title: Configure Archive
howToUse.description: Optionally set archive name and compression level.

howToUse.title: Create and Download
howToUse.description: Click Create to generate the ZIP archive.

useCases.title: File Sharing
useCases.description: Bundle multiple PDFs for easier sharing.

useCases.title: Backup Creation
useCases.description: Create compressed backups of PDF collections.

useCases.title: Email Attachments
useCases.description: Combine PDFs into one attachment for email.

faq.question: How much compression is applied?
faq.answer: ZIP compression typically reduces total size by 10-30%.

faq.question: Is there a file limit?
faq.answer: You can include up to 100 PDFs in a single archive.

faq.question: Can I set a password?
faq.answer: Password-protected ZIP creation is not currently supported.

zh.title: PDF转ZIP
zh.metaDescription: 将多个PDF打包成ZIP压缩包。压缩和捆绑PDF文件。
zh.description:
PDF转ZIP将多个PDF文件打包成一个ZIP压缩包。压缩和捆绑您的PDF以便于共享、存储或备份。

该工具创建包含所有PDF文件的压缩存档，减少总大小并简化文件管理。

所有处理都在您的浏览器中进行，确保您的文件保持私密。

howToUse.title: 上传PDF
howToUse.description: 拖放多个PDF文件或点击选择。

howToUse.title: 配置存档
howToUse.description: 可选设置存档名称和压缩级别。

howToUse.title: 创建并下载
howToUse.description: 点击创建生成ZIP压缩包。

useCases.title: 文件共享
useCases.description: 捆绑多个PDF以便于共享。

useCases.title: 创建备份
useCases.description: 创建PDF集合的压缩备份。

useCases.title: 电子邮件附件
useCases.description: 将PDF合并成一个附件以供电子邮件使用。

faq.question: 应用多少压缩？
faq.answer: ZIP压缩通常将总大小减少10-30%。

faq.question: 有文件限制吗？
faq.answer: 您可以在单个存档中包含最多100个PDF。

faq.question: 可以设置密码吗？
faq.answer: 目前不支持创建受密码保护的ZIP。

en.title: Compare PDFs
en.metaDescription: Compare two PDF documents. Highlight differences between versions.
en.description:
Compare PDFs analyzes two PDF documents and highlights the differences between them. Perfect for reviewing document revisions, checking contract changes, or verifying edits.

View documents side-by-side or in overlay mode with differences highlighted. The tool identifies text changes, additions, and deletions.

All comparison happens in your browser, ensuring your documents remain private.

howToUse.title: Upload Two PDFs
howToUse.description: Upload the original and modified PDF documents.

howToUse.title: Compare Documents
howToUse.description: View differences highlighted in side-by-side or overlay mode.

howToUse.title: Export Results
howToUse.description: Download a comparison report or annotated PDF.

useCases.title: Contract Review
useCases.description: Compare contract versions to identify changes.

useCases.title: Document Revision
useCases.description: Review edits between document versions.

useCases.title: Quality Assurance
useCases.description: Verify that only intended changes were made.

faq.question: What types of differences are detected?
faq.answer: Text additions, deletions, modifications, and formatting changes.

faq.question: Can I compare scanned documents?
faq.answer: Scanned documents should be OCR processed first for text comparison.

faq.question: Is visual comparison available?
faq.answer: Yes, overlay mode shows visual differences between pages.

zh.title: 比较PDF
zh.metaDescription: 比较两个PDF文档。高亮显示版本之间的差异。
zh.description:
比较PDF分析两个PDF文档并高亮显示它们之间的差异。非常适合审阅文档修订、检查合同更改或验证编辑。

以并排或叠加模式查看文档，差异会高亮显示。该工具识别文本更改、添加和删除。

所有比较都在您的浏览器中进行，确保您的文档保持私密。

howToUse.title: 上传两个PDF
howToUse.description: 上传原始和修改后的PDF文档。

howToUse.title: 比较文档
howToUse.description: 以并排或叠加模式查看高亮显示的差异。

howToUse.title: 导出结果
howToUse.description: 下载比较报告或带注释的PDF。

useCases.title: 合同审阅
useCases.description: 比较合同版本以识别更改。

useCases.title: 文档修订
useCases.description: 审阅文档版本之间的编辑。

useCases.title: 质量保证
useCases.description: 验证只进行了预期的更改。

faq.question: 检测哪些类型的差异？
faq.answer: 文本添加、删除、修改和格式更改。

faq.question: 可以比较扫描的文档吗？
faq.answer: 扫描的文档应先进行OCR处理以进行文本比较。

faq.question: 有视觉比较吗？
faq.answer: 是的，叠加模式显示页面之间的视觉差异。

en.title: Posterize PDF
en.metaDescription: Split large PDF pages into printable tiles. Create posters from PDF pages.
en.description:
Posterize PDF splits large PDF pages into smaller tiles that can be printed on standard paper and assembled into posters. Perfect for printing large diagrams, maps, or artwork.

Configure the grid size and overlap for easy assembly. The tool automatically calculates tile dimensions for your target output size.

All processing happens in your browser, ensuring your documents remain private.

howToUse.title: Upload Your PDF
howToUse.description: Drag and drop your large-format PDF or click to select.

howToUse.title: Configure Tiles
howToUse.description: Set grid size, overlap, and output paper size.

howToUse.title: Create and Download
howToUse.description: Click Create to generate printable tiles.

useCases.title: Poster Printing
useCases.description: Print large posters on standard paper.

useCases.title: Map Printing
useCases.description: Print large maps in sections for assembly.

useCases.title: Artwork Reproduction
useCases.description: Create large prints from PDF artwork.

faq.question: What overlap should I use?
faq.answer: A 10-20mm overlap is recommended for easy alignment during assembly.

faq.question: Can I add crop marks?
faq.answer: Yes, crop marks can be added to help with cutting and alignment.

faq.question: What paper sizes are supported?
faq.answer: A4, Letter, A3, and custom sizes are supported.

zh.title: 海报化PDF
zh.metaDescription: 将大型PDF页面分割成可打印的瓷砖。从PDF页面创建海报。
zh.description:
海报化PDF将大型PDF页面分割成可以在标准纸张上打印并组装成海报的较小瓷砖。非常适合打印大型图表、地图或艺术品。

配置网格大小和重叠以便于组装。该工具自动计算目标输出尺寸的瓷砖尺寸。

所有处理都在您的浏览器本地进行，确保您的文档保持私密。

howToUse.title: 上传PDF文件
howToUse.description: 拖放您的大幅面PDF或点击选择。

howToUse.title: 配置瓷砖
howToUse.description: 设置网格大小、重叠和输出纸张尺寸。

howToUse.title: 创建并下载
howToUse.description: 点击创建生成可打印的瓷砖。

useCases.title: 海报打印
useCases.description: 在标准纸张上打印大型海报。

useCases.title: 地图打印
useCases.description: 分段打印大型地图以供组装。

useCases.title: 艺术品复制
useCases.description: 从PDF艺术品创建大型打印品。

faq.question: 应该使用多少重叠？
faq.answer: 建议10-20mm的重叠以便于组装时对齐。

faq.question: 可以添加裁切标记吗？
faq.answer: 是的，可以添加裁切标记以帮助切割和对齐。

faq.question: 支持哪些纸张尺寸？
faq.answer: 支持A4、Letter、A3和自定义尺寸。

en.title: Fix Page Size
en.metaDescription: Standardize PDF page sizes. Convert all pages to uniform dimensions.
en.description:
Fix Page Size standardizes all pages in your PDF to uniform dimensions. Convert mixed-size documents to consistent page sizes for professional presentation or printing.

Choose from standard sizes (A4, Letter, etc.) or set custom dimensions. Content is scaled or positioned to fit the new page size.

All processing happens in your browser, ensuring your documents remain private.

howToUse.title: Upload Your PDF
howToUse.description: Drag and drop your PDF file or click to select.

howToUse.title: Select Target Size
howToUse.description: Choose a standard size or enter custom dimensions.

howToUse.title: Apply and Download
howToUse.description: Click Apply to standardize pages and download.

useCases.title: Print Preparation
useCases.description: Standardize pages for consistent printing.

useCases.title: Document Cleanup
useCases.description: Fix documents with inconsistent page sizes.

useCases.title: Professional Documents
useCases.description: Create uniform documents for distribution.

faq.question: How is content handled?
faq.answer: Content is scaled to fit or centered on the new page size.

faq.question: Can I preserve aspect ratio?
faq.answer: Yes, content can be scaled proportionally to fit.

faq.question: What standard sizes are available?
faq.answer: A4, A3, Letter, Legal, and other common sizes.

zh.title: 修复页面大小
zh.metaDescription: 标准化PDF页面大小。将所有页面转换为统一尺寸。
zh.description:
修复页面大小将PDF中的所有页面标准化为统一尺寸。将混合尺寸文档转换为一致的页面大小，以便专业展示或打印。

从标准尺寸（A4、Letter等）中选择或设置自定义尺寸。内容会缩放或定位以适应新的页面大小。

所有处理都在您的浏览器本地进行，确保您的文档保持私密。

howToUse.title: 上传PDF文件
howToUse.description: 拖放您的PDF文件或点击选择。

howToUse.title: 选择目标大小
howToUse.description: 选择标准尺寸或输入自定义尺寸。

howToUse.title: 应用并下载
howToUse.description: 点击应用标准化页面并下载。

useCases.title: 打印准备
useCases.description: 标准化页面以实现一致的打印。

useCases.title: 文档清理
useCases.description: 修复页面大小不一致的文档。

useCases.title: 专业文档
useCases.description: 创建统一的文档以供分发。

faq.question: 内容如何处理？
faq.answer: 内容会缩放以适应或居中在新页面大小上。

faq.question: 可以保持纵横比吗？
faq.answer: 是的，内容可以按比例缩放以适应。

faq.question: 有哪些标准尺寸可用？
faq.answer: A4、A3、Letter、Legal和其他常见尺寸。

en.title: Linearize PDF
en.metaDescription: Optimize PDF for fast web viewing. Enable progressive loading.
en.description:
Linearize PDF optimizes your documents for fast web viewing. Linearized PDFs can begin displaying before the entire file is downloaded, improving user experience.

Also known as "Fast Web View," this optimization reorganizes the PDF structure for progressive loading in web browsers.

All processing happens in your browser, ensuring your documents remain private.

howToUse.title: Upload Your PDF
howToUse.description: Drag and drop your PDF file or click to select.

howToUse.title: Linearize
howToUse.description: Click Linearize to optimize for web viewing.

howToUse.title: Download
howToUse.description: Download your optimized PDF.

useCases.title: Web Publishing
useCases.description: Optimize PDFs for website downloads.

useCases.title: Email Attachments
useCases.description: Create PDFs that open faster for recipients.

useCases.title: Online Documents
useCases.description: Improve viewing experience for online documents.

faq.question: What is linearization?
faq.answer: Linearization reorganizes PDF data for progressive loading.

faq.question: Does it reduce file size?
faq.answer: Linearization may slightly increase file size due to added structure.

faq.question: Is it compatible with all viewers?
faq.answer: Yes, linearized PDFs work in all PDF readers.

zh.title: 线性化PDF
zh.metaDescription: 优化PDF以实现快速网络查看。启用渐进式加载。
zh.description:
线性化PDF优化您的文档以实现快速网络查看。线性化的PDF可以在整个文件下载完成之前开始显示，改善用户体验。

也称为"快速网络查看"，此优化重新组织PDF结构以实现网络浏览器中的渐进式加载。

所有处理都在您的浏览器本地进行，确保您的文档保持私密。

howToUse.title: 上传PDF文件
howToUse.description: 拖放您的PDF文件或点击选择。

howToUse.title: 线性化
howToUse.description: 点击线性化优化以供网络查看。

howToUse.title: 下载
howToUse.description: 下载优化后的PDF。

useCases.title: 网络发布
useCases.description: 优化PDF以供网站下载。

useCases.title: 电子邮件附件
useCases.description: 创建为收件人更快打开的PDF。

useCases.title: 在线文档
useCases.description: 改善在线文档的查看体验。

faq.question: 什么是线性化？
faq.answer: 线性化重新组织PDF数据以实现渐进式加载。

faq.question: 会减小文件大小吗？
faq.answer: 线性化可能由于添加的结构而略微增加文件大小。

faq.question: 与所有查看器兼容吗？
faq.answer: 是的，线性化的PDF在所有PDF阅读器中都能工作。

en.title: Page Dimensions
en.metaDescription: Analyze PDF page sizes. View dimensions of all pages in your document.
en.description:
Page Dimensions analyzes and displays the size of every page in your PDF document. View dimensions in various units (inches, mm, points) and identify pages with non-standard sizes.

Useful for print preparation, document analysis, or identifying inconsistent page sizes.

All analysis happens in your browser, ensuring your documents remain private.

howToUse.title: Upload Your PDF
howToUse.description: Drag and drop your PDF file or click to select.

howToUse.title: View Dimensions
howToUse.description: See page sizes displayed for all pages.

howToUse.title: Export Report
howToUse.description: Optionally export dimensions as JSON.

useCases.title: Print Planning
useCases.description: Check page sizes before printing.

useCases.title: Document Analysis
useCases.description: Identify pages with unusual dimensions.

useCases.title: Quality Control
useCases.description: Verify page sizes meet specifications.

faq.question: What units are available?
faq.answer: Inches, millimeters, centimeters, and points.

faq.question: Does it show orientation?
faq.answer: Yes, portrait or landscape orientation is indicated.

faq.question: Can I fix inconsistent sizes?
faq.answer: Use Fix Page Size tool to standardize dimensions.

zh.title: 页面尺寸
zh.metaDescription: 分析PDF页面大小。查看文档中所有页面的尺寸。
zh.description:
页面尺寸分析并显示PDF文档中每个页面的大小。以各种单位（英寸、毫米、点）查看尺寸并识别非标准大小的页面。

对于打印准备、文档分析或识别不一致的页面大小非常有用。

所有分析都在您的浏览器中进行，确保您的文档保持私密。

howToUse.title: 上传PDF文件
howToUse.description: 拖放您的PDF文件或点击选择。

howToUse.title: 查看尺寸
howToUse.description: 查看所有页面显示的页面大小。

howToUse.title: 导出报告
howToUse.description: 可选择将尺寸导出为JSON。

useCases.title: 打印规划
useCases.description: 打印前检查页面大小。

useCases.title: 文档分析
useCases.description: 识别尺寸异常的页面。

useCases.title: 质量控制
useCases.description: 验证页面大小符合规格。

faq.question: 有哪些单位可用？
faq.answer: 英寸、毫米、厘米和点。

faq.question: 会显示方向吗？
faq.answer: 是的，会指示纵向或横向方向。

faq.question: 可以修复不一致的大小吗？
faq.answer: 使用修复页面大小工具标准化尺寸。

en.title: Remove Restrictions
en.metaDescription: Remove PDF restrictions. Unlock printing, copying, and editing permissions.
en.description:
Remove Restrictions unlocks PDFs that have permission restrictions preventing printing, copying, or editing. This tool removes owner password restrictions while preserving document content.

Note: This tool cannot remove user passwords that prevent opening the document. Use Decrypt PDF for password-protected files.

All processing happens in your browser, ensuring your documents remain private.

howToUse.title: Upload Restricted PDF
howToUse.description: Drag and drop your restricted PDF or click to select.

howToUse.title: Remove Restrictions
howToUse.description: Click Remove to unlock the document.

howToUse.title: Download
howToUse.description: Download the unrestricted PDF.

useCases.title: Enable Printing
useCases.description: Unlock PDFs that prevent printing.

useCases.title: Enable Copying
useCases.description: Allow text selection and copying.

useCases.title: Enable Editing
useCases.description: Remove restrictions on document editing.

faq.question: Is this legal?
faq.answer: Removing restrictions from documents you own or have rights to is generally legal.

faq.question: Can it remove open passwords?
faq.answer: No, use Decrypt PDF for password-protected documents.

faq.question: Will content be affected?
faq.answer: No, only restrictions are removed; content remains unchanged.

zh.title: 删除限制
zh.metaDescription: 删除PDF限制。解锁打印、复制和编辑权限。
zh.description:
删除限制解锁具有权限限制的PDF，这些限制阻止打印、复制或编辑。此工具在保留文档内容的同时删除所有者密码限制。

注意：此工具无法删除阻止打开文档的用户密码。对于受密码保护的文件，请使用解密PDF。

所有处理都在您的浏览器本地进行，确保您的文档保持私密。

howToUse.title: 上传受限PDF
howToUse.description: 拖放您的受限PDF或点击选择。

howToUse.title: 删除限制
howToUse.description: 点击删除解锁文档。

howToUse.title: 下载
howToUse.description: 下载不受限制的PDF。

useCases.title: 启用打印
useCases.description: 解锁阻止打印的PDF。

useCases.title: 启用复制
useCases.description: 允许文本选择和复制。

useCases.title: 启用编辑
useCases.description: 删除文档编辑限制。

faq.question: 这合法吗？
faq.answer: 从您拥有或有权使用的文档中删除限制通常是合法的。

faq.question: 可以删除打开密码吗？
faq.answer: 不能，对于受密码保护的文档请使用解密PDF。

faq.question: 内容会受影响吗？
faq.answer: 不会，只删除限制；内容保持不变。

en.title: Sanitize PDF
en.metaDescription: Remove hidden data from PDFs. Clean metadata, scripts, and sensitive information.
en.description:
Sanitize PDF removes hidden data and potentially sensitive information from your documents. Strip metadata, embedded scripts, attachments, comments, and other hidden content.

Essential for preparing documents for public distribution or when privacy is a concern.

All sanitization happens in your browser, ensuring your documents remain private.

howToUse.title: Upload Your PDF
howToUse.description: Drag and drop your PDF file or click to select.

howToUse.title: Select What to Remove
howToUse.description: Choose which types of hidden data to strip.

howToUse.title: Sanitize and Download
howToUse.description: Click Sanitize to clean the PDF and download.

useCases.title: Public Release
useCases.description: Prepare documents for public distribution.

useCases.title: Privacy Protection
useCases.description: Remove personal information before sharing.

useCases.title: Security Compliance
useCases.description: Meet security requirements for document handling.

faq.question: What hidden data is removed?
faq.answer: Metadata, scripts, attachments, comments, form data, and hidden layers.

faq.question: Will visible content be affected?
faq.answer: No, only hidden data is removed; visible content remains.

faq.question: Is this reversible?
faq.answer: No, removed data cannot be recovered. Keep a backup of the original.

zh.title: 清理PDF
zh.metaDescription: 从PDF中删除隐藏数据。清除元数据、脚本和敏感信息。
zh.description:
清理PDF从您的文档中删除隐藏数据和潜在敏感信息。去除元数据、嵌入脚本、附件、评论和其他隐藏内容。

对于准备公开分发的文档或当隐私是关注点时至关重要。

所有清理都在您的浏览器中进行，确保您的文档保持私密。

howToUse.title: 上传PDF文件
howToUse.description: 拖放您的PDF文件或点击选择。

howToUse.title: 选择要删除的内容
howToUse.description: 选择要去除的隐藏数据类型。

howToUse.title: 清理并下载
howToUse.description: 点击清理清洁PDF并下载。

useCases.title: 公开发布
useCases.description: 准备文档以供公开分发。

useCases.title: 隐私保护
useCases.description: 在共享前删除个人信息。

useCases.title: 安全合规
useCases.description: 满足文档处理的安全要求。

faq.question: 删除哪些隐藏数据？
faq.answer: 元数据、脚本、附件、评论、表单数据和隐藏图层。

faq.question: 可见内容会受影响吗？
faq.answer: 不会，只删除隐藏数据；可见内容保持不变。

faq.question: 这是可逆的吗？
faq.answer: 不，删除的数据无法恢复。保留原件的备份。

en.title: Find and Redact
en.metaDescription: Search and redact text across all pages of a PDF. Batch redact sensitive information like account numbers, names, and more.
en.description:
Find and Redact allows you to search for specific text, numbers, or patterns across all pages of your PDF and redact all matching occurrences at once. Perfect for removing sensitive information like account numbers, names, addresses, or any confidential data.

Preview all matches before applying redactions, and selectively choose which occurrences to redact. Supports case-sensitive search, whole word matching, and regular expressions for advanced pattern matching.

All processing happens in your browser, ensuring your documents remain private and secure.

howToUse.title: Upload Your PDF
howToUse.description: Drag and drop your PDF file or click to select.

howToUse.title: Search for Text
howToUse.description: Enter the text, number, or regex pattern you want to find and redact.

howToUse.title: Review and Select
howToUse.description: Preview all matches and select which ones to redact.

howToUse.title: Apply Redaction
howToUse.description: Customize redaction appearance and apply to selected matches.

useCases.title: Privacy Compliance
useCases.description: Redact personal information to comply with GDPR, HIPAA, or other regulations.

useCases.title: Legal Documents
useCases.description: Remove confidential data from legal documents before sharing.

useCases.title: Financial Records
useCases.description: Redact account numbers, SSNs, or financial data from statements.

faq.question: Is redaction permanent?
faq.answer: Yes, redaction permanently removes the underlying text. The original content cannot be recovered. Always keep a backup of the original file.

faq.question: Can I redact images or scanned text?
faq.answer: This tool works with text-based PDFs. For scanned documents, you would need to use manual area-based redaction.

faq.question: Can I customize the redaction appearance?
faq.answer: Yes, you can set the redaction color, add borders, and optionally include replacement text like "[REDACTED]".

faq.question: How does regex search work?
faq.answer: Enable "Use Regular Expression" to search using regex patterns. For example, \d{4}-\d{4}-\d{4}-\d{4} to find credit card numbers.

zh.title: 查找并遮盖
zh.metaDescription: 搜索并批量遮盖PDF中的敏感文本。支持正则表达式匹配账号、姓名等敏感信息。
zh.description:
查找并遮盖允许您在PDF的所有页面中搜索特定文本、数字或模式，并一次性遮盖所有匹配项。非常适合删除敏感信息，如账号、姓名、地址或任何机密数据。

在应用遮盖前预览所有匹配项，并选择性地选择要遮盖的出现次数。支持区分大小写搜索、全词匹配和正则表达式以进行高级模式匹配。

所有处理都在您的浏览器中进行，确保您的文档保持私密和安全。

howToUse.title: 上传PDF文件
howToUse.description: 拖放您的PDF文件或点击选择。

howToUse.title: 搜索文本
howToUse.description: 输入要查找和遮盖的文本、数字或正则表达式模式。

howToUse.title: 审查并选择
howToUse.description: 预览所有匹配项并选择要遮盖的项目。

howToUse.title: 应用遮盖
howToUse.description: 自定义遮盖外观并应用于所选匹配项。

useCases.title: 隐私合规
useCases.description: 遮盖个人信息以符合GDPR、HIPAA或其他法规。

useCases.title: 法律文档
useCases.description: 在共享前从法律文档中删除机密数据。

useCases.title: 财务记录
useCases.description: 从报表中遮盖账号、社保号或财务数据。

faq.question: 遮盖是永久的吗？
faq.answer: 是的，遮盖会永久删除底层文本。原始内容无法恢复。请始终保留原始文件的备份。

faq.question: 可以遮盖图像或扫描文本吗？
faq.answer: 此工具适用于基于文本的PDF。对于扫描文档，您需要使用基于区域的手动遮盖。

faq.question: 可以自定义遮盖外观吗？
faq.answer: 是的，您可以设置遮盖颜色、添加边框，并可选择包含替换文本如"[已遮盖]"。

faq.question: 正则表达式搜索如何工作？
faq.answer: 启用"使用正则表达式"以使用正则模式搜索。例如，\d{4}-\d{4}-\d{4}-\d{4}可查找信用卡号。

en.title: Flatten PDF
en.metaDescription: Flatten PDF forms and annotations. Make content non-editable.
en.description:
Flatten PDF converts interactive elements like form fields and annotations into static content. The flattened PDF looks the same but can no longer be edited.

Perfect for finalizing filled forms, preserving annotations, or creating non-editable document versions.

All processing happens in your browser, ensuring your documents remain private.

howToUse.title: Upload Your PDF
howToUse.description: Drag and drop your PDF with forms or annotations.

howToUse.title: Select What to Flatten
howToUse.description: Choose to flatten forms, annotations, or both.

howToUse.title: Flatten and Download
howToUse.description: Click Flatten to create the static PDF.

useCases.title: Finalize Forms
useCases.description: Lock filled form data to prevent changes.

useCases.title: Preserve Annotations
useCases.description: Make annotations permanent in the document.

useCases.title: Archive Documents
useCases.description: Create non-editable versions for archiving.

faq.question: Is flattening reversible?
faq.answer: No, flattening is permanent. Keep a backup of the original.

faq.question: Will the appearance change?
faq.answer: No, the document looks the same but is no longer interactive.

faq.question: Does it reduce file size?
faq.answer: Sometimes, as interactive elements are converted to simpler content.

zh.title: 扁平化PDF
zh.metaDescription: 扁平化PDF表单和注释。使内容不可编辑。
zh.description:
扁平化PDF将表单字段和注释等交互元素转换为静态内容。扁平化的PDF看起来相同，但不能再编辑。

非常适合完成已填写的表单、保留注释或创建不可编辑的文档版本。

所有处理都在您的浏览器本地进行，确保您的文档保持私密。

howToUse.title: 上传PDF文件
howToUse.description: 拖放您带有表单或注释的PDF。

howToUse.title: 选择要扁平化的内容
howToUse.description: 选择扁平化表单、注释或两者。

howToUse.title: 扁平化并下载
howToUse.description: 点击扁平化创建静态PDF。

useCases.title: 完成表单
useCases.description: 锁定已填写的表单数据以防止更改。

useCases.title: 保留注释
useCases.description: 使注释在文档中永久化。

useCases.title: 存档文档
useCases.description: 创建不可编辑的版本以供存档。

faq.question: 扁平化是可逆的吗？
faq.answer: 不，扁平化是永久的。保留原件的备份。

faq.question: 外观会改变吗？
faq.answer: 不会，文档看起来相同，但不再是交互式的。

faq.question: 会减小文件大小吗？
faq.answer: 有时会，因为交互元素被转换为更简单的内容。

en.title: Remove Metadata
en.metaDescription: Strip metadata from PDF files. Remove author, dates, and document properties.
en.description:
Remove Metadata strips all document properties and metadata from your PDF files. Remove author names, creation dates, software information, and other identifying data.

Essential for privacy when sharing documents or when metadata could reveal sensitive information.

All processing happens in your browser, ensuring your documents remain private.

howToUse.title: Upload Your PDF
howToUse.description: Drag and drop your PDF file or click to select.

howToUse.title: Remove Metadata
howToUse.description: Click Remove to strip all metadata.

howToUse.title: Download
howToUse.description: Download the metadata-free PDF.

useCases.title: Privacy Protection
useCases.description: Remove personal information before sharing.

useCases.title: Anonymous Documents
useCases.description: Create documents without author attribution.

useCases.title: Clean Distribution
useCases.description: Distribute documents without internal metadata.

faq.question: What metadata is removed?
faq.answer: Author, title, subject, keywords, dates, creator, and producer information.

faq.question: Is XMP metadata removed?
faq.answer: Yes, both standard and XMP metadata are stripped.

faq.question: Will content be affected?
faq.answer: No, only metadata is removed; document content remains unchanged.

zh.title: 删除元数据
zh.metaDescription: 从PDF文件中去除元数据。删除作者、日期和文档属性。
zh.description:
删除元数据从您的PDF文件中去除所有文档属性和元数据。删除作者姓名、创建日期、软件信息和其他识别数据。

在共享文档或当元数据可能泄露敏感信息时，对于隐私至关重要。

所有处理都在您的浏览器本地进行，确保您的文档保持私密。

howToUse.title: 上传PDF文件
howToUse.description: 拖放您的PDF文件或点击选择。

howToUse.title: 删除元数据
howToUse.description: 点击删除去除所有元数据。

howToUse.title: 下载
howToUse.description: 下载无元数据的PDF。

useCases.title: 隐私保护
useCases.description: 在共享前删除个人信息。

useCases.title: 匿名文档
useCases.description: 创建没有作者归属的文档。

useCases.title: 干净分发
useCases.description: 分发没有内部元数据的文档。

faq.question: 删除哪些元数据？
faq.answer: 作者、标题、主题、关键词、日期、创建者和生产者信息。

faq.question: XMP元数据会删除吗？
faq.answer: 是的，标准和XMP元数据都会去除。

faq.question: 内容会受影响吗？
faq.answer: 不会，只删除元数据；文档内容保持不变。

en.title: Change Permissions
en.metaDescription: Modify PDF permissions. Control printing, copying, and editing access.
en.description:
Change Permissions modifies the access controls on your PDF documents. Enable or disable printing, copying, editing, and annotation permissions.

Set an owner password to enforce these restrictions. Recipients can view the document but are limited in what actions they can perform.

All processing happens in your browser, ensuring your documents remain private.

howToUse.title: Upload Your PDF
howToUse.description: Drag and drop your PDF file or click to select.

howToUse.title: Set Permissions
howToUse.description: Enable or disable printing, copying, editing, and annotations.

howToUse.title: Apply and Download
howToUse.description: Set owner password and download the restricted PDF.

useCases.title: Prevent Copying
useCases.description: Disable text copying to protect content.

useCases.title: Control Printing
useCases.description: Restrict or allow document printing.

useCases.title: Limit Editing
useCases.description: Prevent modifications to the document.

faq.question: Do I need a password?
faq.answer: An owner password is required to enforce permissions.

faq.question: Can permissions be removed?
faq.answer: Yes, with the owner password or using Remove Restrictions tool.

faq.question: Are all PDF readers compatible?
faq.answer: Most PDF readers respect permissions, but some may not enforce them.

zh.title: 更改权限
zh.metaDescription: 修改PDF权限。控制打印、复制和编辑访问。
zh.description:
更改权限修改PDF文档的访问控制。启用或禁用打印、复制、编辑和注释权限。

设置所有者密码以强制执行这些限制。收件人可以查看文档，但在可执行的操作上受到限制。

所有处理都在您的浏览器本地进行，确保您的文档保持私密。

howToUse.title: 上传PDF文件
howToUse.description: 拖放您的PDF文件或点击选择。

howToUse.title: 设置权限
howToUse.description: 启用或禁用打印、复制、编辑和注释。

howToUse.title: 应用并下载
howToUse.description: 设置所有者密码并下载受限PDF。

useCases.title: 防止复制
useCases.description: 禁用文本复制以保护内容。

useCases.title: 控制打印
useCases.description: 限制或允许文档打印。

useCases.title: 限制编辑
useCases.description: 防止对文档的修改。

faq.question: 需要密码吗？
faq.answer: 需要所有者密码来强制执行权限。

faq.question: 权限可以删除吗？
faq.answer: 是的，使用所有者密码或删除限制工具。

faq.question: 所有PDF阅读器都兼容吗？
faq.answer: 大多数PDF阅读器尊重权限，但有些可能不强制执行。

en.title: PDF to Markdown
en.metaDescription: Convert PDF to Markdown format. Extract text and preserve formatting like headings and lists.
en.description:
PDF to Markdown converts your PDF documents into clean, well-structured Markdown files. The tool intelligently extracts text content and attempts to preserve formatting like headings, lists, and paragraphs.

Perfect for converting PDF documents to editable formats for documentation, note-taking, or content management systems that support Markdown.

All conversion happens locally in your browser, ensuring your documents remain private and secure.

howToUse.title: Upload Your PDF
howToUse.description: Drag and drop your PDF file or click to select.

howToUse.title: Configure Options
howToUse.description: Set page range, choose to include page numbers, and adjust line break settings.

howToUse.title: Convert and Download
howToUse.description: Click Convert to generate your Markdown file and download.

useCases.title: Documentation
useCases.description: Convert PDF manuals and guides to Markdown for version-controlled documentation.

useCases.title: Note Taking
useCases.description: Extract content from PDF articles and books for your note-taking system.

useCases.title: Content Migration
useCases.description: Migrate PDF content to CMS platforms that support Markdown.

faq.question: Is formatting preserved?
faq.answer: The tool attempts to detect headings based on font size and bullet points/numbered lists. Complex layouts may require manual adjustment.

faq.question: Can I convert specific pages?
faq.answer: Yes, you can specify a page range like "1-3, 5, 7" to convert only those pages.

faq.question: Does it work with scanned PDFs?
faq.answer: Scanned PDFs contain images, not text. Use our OCR tool first to extract text before converting to Markdown.

zh.title: PDF转Markdown
zh.metaDescription: 将PDF转换为Markdown格式。提取文本并保留标题和列表等格式。
zh.description:
PDF转Markdown将您的PDF文档转换为干净、结构良好的Markdown文件。该工具智能提取文本内容，并尝试保留标题、列表和段落等格式。

非常适合将PDF文档转换为可编辑格式，用于文档编写、笔记记录或支持Markdown的内容管理系统。

所有转换都在您的浏览器本地进行，确保您的文档保持私密和安全。

howToUse.title: 上传PDF文件
howToUse.description: 拖放您的PDF文件或点击选择。

howToUse.title: 配置选项
howToUse.description: 设置页面范围，选择是否包含页码，并调整换行设置。

howToUse.title: 转换并下载
howToUse.description: 点击转换生成Markdown文件并下载。

useCases.title: 文档编写
useCases.description: 将PDF手册和指南转换为Markdown，用于版本控制的文档。

useCases.title: 笔记记录
useCases.description: 从PDF文章和书籍中提取内容到您的笔记系统。

useCases.title: 内容迁移
useCases.description: 将PDF内容迁移到支持Markdown的CMS平台。

faq.question: 格式会保留吗？
faq.answer: 该工具会根据字体大小检测标题，以及项目符号/编号列表。复杂布局可能需要手动调整。

faq.question: 可以转换特定页面吗？
faq.answer: 是的，您可以指定页面范围如"1-3, 5, 7"以仅转换这些页面。

faq.question: 扫描的PDF能用吗？
faq.answer: 扫描的PDF包含图像而非文本。请先使用我们的OCR工具提取文本，然后再转换为Markdown。

en.title: PDF Booklet Creator
en.metaDescription: Create booklet layouts from PDF for printing. Arrange pages for saddle-stitch binding with multiple grid options.
en.description:
PDF Booklet Creator arranges your PDF pages into booklet layouts ready for print-and-fold production. Perfect for creating brochures, zines, booklets, and saddle-stitched publications.

Choose from various grid modes (1x2, 2x2, 2x4, 4x4), paper sizes, and orientation options. The tool automatically handles page imposition for proper folding sequence.

All processing happens locally in your browser, ensuring your documents remain private.

howToUse.title: Upload Your PDF
howToUse.description: Upload the PDF document you want to convert to a booklet.

howToUse.title: Choose Layout
howToUse.description: Select grid mode, paper size, orientation, and rotation options.

howToUse.title: Create and Download
howToUse.description: Generate the booklet layout and download for printing.

useCases.title: Brochures
useCases.description: Create fold-ready brochures from standard PDF documents.

useCases.title: Zines
useCases.description: Produce self-published zines with proper page imposition.

useCases.title: Event Programs
useCases.description: Create professional program booklets for events.

faq.question: What is saddle-stitch binding?
faq.answer: Saddle-stitch is a binding method where folded sheets are nested and stapled through the fold.

faq.question: Which grid mode should I use?
faq.answer: 1x2 is standard for booklets. Use 2x2 or larger for multi-up printing to save paper.

faq.question: Can I preview the layout?
faq.answer: Yes, the tool provides a visual preview before generating the final booklet.

zh.title: PDF小册子制作
zh.metaDescription: 从PDF创建小册子布局以供打印。为骑马钉装订排列页面，支持多种网格选项。
zh.description:
PDF小册子制作将您的PDF页面排列成适合打印和折叠制作的小册子布局。非常适合创建宣传册、杂志、小册子和骑马钉装订出版物。

从各种网格模式（1x2、2x2、2x4、4x4）、纸张尺寸和方向选项中选择。该工具自动处理页面拼版以实现正确的折叠顺序。

所有处理都在您的浏览器本地进行，确保您的文档保持私密。

howToUse.title: 上传PDF文件
howToUse.description: 上传您想要转换为小册子的PDF文档。

howToUse.title: 选择布局
howToUse.description: 选择网格模式、纸张大小、方向和旋转选项。

howToUse.title: 创建并下载
howToUse.description: 生成小册子布局并下载以供打印。

useCases.title: 宣传册
useCases.description: 从标准PDF文档创建可折叠的宣传册。

useCases.title: 杂志
useCases.description: 制作具有正确页面拼版的自出版杂志。

useCases.title: 活动手册
useCases.description: 为活动创建专业的手册小册子。

faq.question: 什么是骑马钉装订？
faq.answer: 骑马钉是一种装订方法，将折叠的纸张嵌套并通过折痕钉合。

faq.question: 我应该使用哪种网格模式？
faq.answer: 1x2是小册子的标准模式。使用2x2或更大的模式进行多页打印以节省纸张。

faq.question: 可以预览布局吗？
faq.answer: 是的，该工具在生成最终小册子之前提供可视预览。

en.title: Rasterize PDF
en.metaDescription: Convert PDF pages to high-quality images. Export as PNG, JPEG, or WebP with custom DPI settings.
en.description:
Rasterize PDF converts your PDF pages into high-quality raster images. Choose from PNG, JPEG, or WebP output formats with full control over DPI and quality settings.

Perfect for creating thumbnails, social media graphics, or archiving PDF content as images. Supports page range selection and batch processing.

All processing happens locally in your browser, ensuring your documents remain private.

howToUse.title: Upload Your PDF
howToUse.description: Drag and drop your PDF file or click to select.

howToUse.title: Configure Output
howToUse.description: Select DPI, output format (PNG/JPEG/WebP), quality, and page range.

howToUse.title: Convert and Download
howToUse.description: Process pages and download images individually or as a ZIP archive.

useCases.title: Social Media
useCases.description: Convert PDF slides to images for social media posting.

useCases.title: Thumbnails
useCases.description: Generate preview thumbnails for PDF documents.

useCases.title: Web Publishing
useCases.description: Convert PDF content to web-friendly image formats.

faq.question: What DPI should I use?
faq.answer: 72 DPI for screen, 150 DPI for general use, 300 DPI for print quality.

faq.question: Which format is best?
faq.answer: PNG for quality/transparency, JPEG for small size, WebP for modern web use.

faq.question: Can I convert specific pages?
faq.answer: Yes, specify page ranges like "1-5, 8, 10-15" to convert only those pages.

zh.title: 光栅化PDF
zh.metaDescription: 将PDF页面转换为高质量图像。导出为PNG、JPEG或WebP，支持自定义DPI设置。
zh.description:
光栅化PDF将您的PDF页面转换为高质量的光栅图像。从PNG、JPEG或WebP输出格式中选择，完全控制DPI和质量设置。

非常适合创建缩略图、社交媒体图形或将PDF内容归档为图像。支持页面范围选择和批量处理。

所有处理都在您的浏览器本地进行，确保您的文档保持私密。

howToUse.title: 上传PDF文件
howToUse.description: 拖放您的PDF文件或点击选择。

howToUse.title: 配置输出
howToUse.description: 选择DPI、输出格式（PNG/JPEG/WebP）、质量和页面范围。

howToUse.title: 转换并下载
howToUse.description: 处理页面并单独下载图像或作为ZIP归档下载。

useCases.title: 社交媒体
useCases.description: 将PDF幻灯片转换为图像以在社交媒体上发布。

useCases.title: 缩略图
useCases.description: 为PDF文档生成预览缩略图。

useCases.title: 网络发布
useCases.description: 将PDF内容转换为网络友好的图像格式。

faq.question: 我应该使用什么DPI？
faq.answer: 屏幕使用72 DPI，一般使用150 DPI，打印质量使用300 DPI。

faq.question: 哪种格式最好？
faq.answer: PNG用于质量/透明度，JPEG用于小尺寸，WebP用于现代网络使用。

faq.question: 可以转换特定页面吗？
faq.answer: 是的，指定页面范围如"1-5, 8, 10-15"以仅转换这些页面。

en.title: Markdown to PDF
en.metaDescription: Convert Markdown files to beautifully formatted PDF documents. Support for GitHub Flavored Markdown and syntax highlighting.
en.description:
Markdown to PDF converts your Markdown files into professionally styled PDF documents. Support for CommonMark and GitHub Flavored Markdown (GFM) including tables, task lists, and code blocks.

Choose from multiple themes (light, dark, GitHub) and customize page size and margins. Code blocks are syntax-highlighted for better readability.

All conversion happens locally in your browser, ensuring your content remains private.

howToUse.title: Upload Markdown File
howToUse.description: Upload your .md or .markdown file.

howToUse.title: Choose Theme
howToUse.description: Select a visual theme and configure page settings.

howToUse.title: Convert and Download
howToUse.description: Generate the styled PDF and download.

useCases.title: Documentation
useCases.description: Convert README files and docs to shareable PDFs.

useCases.title: Notes Export
useCases.description: Export Markdown notes to PDF for printing or sharing.

useCases.title: Reports
useCases.description: Create reports from Markdown with professional styling.

faq.question: Is GitHub Flavored Markdown supported?
faq.answer: Yes, tables, task lists, strikethrough, and other GFM features are supported.

faq.question: Can I customize the styling?
faq.answer: Choose from preset themes or add custom CSS for full control.

faq.question: Are code blocks highlighted?
faq.answer: Yes, code blocks include syntax highlighting for common languages.

zh.title: Markdown转PDF
zh.metaDescription: 将Markdown文件转换为格式精美的PDF文档。支持GitHub风格Markdown和语法高亮。
zh.description:
Markdown转PDF将您的Markdown文件转换为专业样式的PDF文档。支持CommonMark和GitHub风格Markdown（GFM），包括表格、任务列表和代码块。

从多个主题（浅色、深色、GitHub）中选择，并自定义页面大小和边距。代码块具有语法高亮以提高可读性。

所有转换都在您的浏览器本地进行，确保您的内容保持私密。

howToUse.description: 上传您的.md或.markdown文件。

howToUse.description: 选择视觉主题并配置页面设置。

howToUse.title: 转换并下载
howToUse.description: 生成样式化的PDF并下载。

useCases.title: 文档

useCases.title: 笔记导出
useCases.description: 将Markdown笔记导出为PDF以供打印或共享。

useCases.title: 报告
useCases.description: 从Markdown创建具有专业样式的报告。

faq.question: 是否支持GitHub风格Markdown？
faq.answer: 是的，支持表格、任务列表、删除线和其他GFM功能。

faq.question: 可以自定义样式吗？
faq.answer: 从预设主题中选择或添加自定义CSS以完全控制。

faq.question: 代码块是否高亮？
faq.answer: 是的，代码块包含常见语言的语法高亮。

en.title: CBZ to PDF
en.metaDescription: Convert comic book archives (CBZ) to PDF. Preserve image order and quality for digital comics.
en.description:
CBZ to PDF converts Comic Book Archive files into PDF documents. The tool extracts all images from the CBZ archive and compiles them into a PDF while maintaining the correct reading order.

Choose from various page size options including original image dimensions or standardized comic book sizes. Perfect for reading comics on devices that support PDF but not CBZ.

All conversion happens locally in your browser, ensuring your comics remain private.

howToUse.title: Upload CBZ File
howToUse.description: Upload your .cbz comic book archive file.

howToUse.title: Select Options
howToUse.description: Choose page size and image quality settings.

howToUse.title: Convert and Download
howToUse.description: Convert to PDF and download your comic.

useCases.title: E-Reader Compatibility
useCases.description: Convert CBZ to PDF for e-readers that only support PDF.

useCases.title: Comic Archives
useCases.description: Create PDF archives of your digital comic collection.

useCases.title: Print Preparation
useCases.description: Convert digital comics to PDF for printing.

faq.question: What is CBZ format?
faq.answer: CBZ is a ZIP archive containing comic book pages as image files, renamed with .cbz extension.

faq.question: Is image quality preserved?
faq.answer: Yes, images are embedded at their original quality in the PDF.

faq.question: Are nested folders supported?
faq.answer: Yes, images from all folders within the archive are extracted and sorted.

zh.title: CBZ转PDF
zh.metaDescription: 将漫画书归档文件（CBZ）转换为PDF。保留图像顺序和质量，适用于数字漫画。
zh.description:
CBZ转PDF将漫画书归档文件转换为PDF文档。该工具从CBZ归档中提取所有图像，并将它们编译成PDF，同时保持正确的阅读顺序。

从各种页面大小选项中选择，包括原始图像尺寸或标准化的漫画书尺寸。非常适合在支持PDF但不支持CBZ的设备上阅读漫画。

所有转换都在您的浏览器本地进行，确保您的漫画保持私密。

howToUse.title: 上传CBZ文件
howToUse.description: 上传您的.cbz漫画书归档文件。

howToUse.title: 选择选项
howToUse.description: 选择页面大小和图像质量设置。

howToUse.title: 转换并下载
howToUse.description: 转换为PDF并下载您的漫画。

useCases.title: 电子阅读器兼容性
useCases.description: 将CBZ转换为PDF，适用于仅支持PDF的电子阅读器。

useCases.title: 漫画归档
useCases.description: 为您的数字漫画收藏创建PDF归档。

useCases.title: 打印准备
useCases.description: 将数字漫画转换为PDF以供打印。

faq.question: 什么是CBZ格式？
faq.answer: CBZ是一个包含漫画书页面图像文件的ZIP归档，重命名为.cbz扩展名。

faq.question: 图像质量是否保留？
faq.answer: 是的，图像以原始质量嵌入到PDF中。

faq.question: 是否支持嵌套文件夹？
faq.answer: 是的，归档中所有文件夹的图像都会被提取和排序。

en.title: Font to Outline
en.metaDescription: Remove font dependencies from PDF documents by converting pages to high-quality images. Ensures compatibility across all systems.
en.description:
Font to Outline removes all font dependencies from your PDF by converting each page into high-quality rasterized content. This ensures your document looks exactly the same on any system, even if the original fonts are not installed.

The tool renders each page at your chosen DPI (150-600), removing embedded fonts while preserving the exact visual appearance. Optionally, you can add an invisible text layer to maintain searchability.

This is essential for print preparation, cross-platform compatibility, and avoiding font licensing issues when sharing documents. All processing happens locally in your browser.

howToUse.title: Upload Your PDF
howToUse.description: Upload the PDF containing fonts you want to remove.

howToUse.title: Configure Quality
howToUse.description: Choose DPI (300 recommended for print, 150 for screen). Enable searchable text if needed.

howToUse.title: Convert and Download
howToUse.description: Process the file and download the font-independent PDF.

useCases.title: Print Preparation
useCases.description: Eliminate font issues at commercial printers by removing all font dependencies.

useCases.title: Cross-Platform Sharing
useCases.description: Share documents that look identical on any device, regardless of installed fonts.

useCases.title: Font Licensing
useCases.description: Remove embedded fonts to avoid licensing concerns when distributing documents.

faq.question: How does this work?
faq.answer: The tool renders each page at high resolution (your chosen DPI) and recreates the PDF from these images, removing all font dependencies while preserving visual appearance.

faq.question: Can I still select text after conversion?
faq.answer: By default, no. Text becomes part of the image. However, you can enable "Preserve searchable text" to add an invisible text layer for search and copy functionality.

faq.question: What DPI should I use?
faq.answer: 300 DPI is recommended for print-quality output. 150 DPI is sufficient for screen viewing and produces smaller files. 600 DPI is for highest quality but creates large files.

faq.question: Will file size increase?
faq.answer: File size depends on DPI and content. 150 DPI usually produces smaller files, 300 DPI may increase size, 600 DPI significantly increases size. Compression is automatically applied.

faq.question: Is this reversible?
faq.answer: No, font data is permanently removed. Keep a backup of the original if you need editable text with the original fonts.

faq.question: What about vector graphics?
faq.answer: Vector graphics (shapes, lines) in the original PDF will be converted to raster along with text. The visual quality is preserved at your chosen DPI.

zh.title: 字体转轮廓
zh.metaDescription: 通过将页面转换为高质量图像来删除PDF文档的字体依赖。确保在所有系统上的兼容性。
zh.description:
字体转轮廓通过将每个页面转换为高质量的光栅化内容来删除PDF中的所有字体依赖。这确保您的文档在任何系统上看起来完全相同，即使未安装原始字体。

该工具以您选择的DPI（150-600）渲染每个页面，删除嵌入的字体同时保留确切的视觉外观。可选地，您可以添加不可见的文本层以保持可搜索性。

这对于打印准备、跨平台兼容性以及在共享文档时避免字体许可问题至关重要。所有处理都在您的浏览器本地进行。

howToUse.title: 上传PDF文件
howToUse.description: 上传包含要删除字体的PDF。

howToUse.title: 配置质量
howToUse.description: 选择DPI（打印推荐300，屏幕推荐150）。如需要，启用可搜索文本。

howToUse.title: 转换并下载
howToUse.description: 处理文件并下载独立于字体的PDF。

useCases.title: 打印准备
useCases.description: 通过删除所有字体依赖来消除商业打印机的字体问题。

useCases.title: 跨平台共享
useCases.description: 共享在任何设备上看起来相同的文档，无论安装了什么字体。

useCases.title: 字体许可
useCases.description: 删除嵌入的字体以避免分发文档时的许可问题。

faq.question: 这是如何工作的？
faq.answer: 该工具以高分辨率（您选择的DPI）渲染每个页面，并从这些图像重新创建PDF，删除所有字体依赖同时保留视觉外观。

faq.question: 转换后还能选择文本吗？
faq.answer: 默认情况下不能。文本成为图像的一部分。但是，您可以启用"保留可搜索文本"以添加不可见的文本层用于搜索和复制功能。

faq.question: 我应该使用什么DPI？
faq.answer: 打印质量输出推荐300 DPI。屏幕查看150 DPI就足够了，并产生较小的文件。600 DPI用于最高质量但会创建大文件。

faq.question: 文件大小会增加吗？
faq.answer: 文件大小取决于DPI和内容。150 DPI通常产生较小的文件，300 DPI可能增加大小，600 DPI显著增加大小。会自动应用压缩。

faq.question: 这是可逆的吗？
faq.answer: 不，字体数据被永久删除。如果需要使用原始字体的可编辑文本，请保留原始文件的备份。

faq.question: 矢量图形怎么办？
faq.answer: 原始PDF中的矢量图形（形状、线条）将与文本一起转换为光栅。视觉质量在您选择的DPI下得以保留。

en.title: Extract Tables from PDF
en.metaDescription: Detect and extract tables from PDF documents. Export to JSON, Markdown, or CSV formats.
en.description:
Extract Tables from PDF detects tabular data within your PDF documents and exports it in structured formats. Choose JSON for data integration, Markdown for documentation, or CSV for spreadsheets.

The tool uses intelligent detection algorithms to identify table structures even in complex documents. Specify page ranges and adjust detection parameters for optimal results.

All processing happens locally in your browser, ensuring your documents remain private.

howToUse.title: Upload Your PDF
howToUse.description: Upload the PDF containing tables you want to extract.

howToUse.title: Configure Detection
howToUse.description: Set page range and minimum column/row thresholds.

howToUse.title: Export and Download
howToUse.description: Choose output format (JSON/Markdown/CSV) and download.

useCases.title: Data Analysis
useCases.description: Extract table data for analysis in spreadsheets or databases.

useCases.title: Report Processing
useCases.description: Pull tables from PDF reports for further processing.

useCases.title: Documentation
useCases.description: Convert PDF tables to Markdown for technical documentation.

faq.question: Can it detect complex tables?
faq.answer: The tool works best with simple grid tables. Complex merged cells may require manual adjustment.

faq.question: What if no tables are found?
faq.answer: Try adjusting the minimum columns/rows threshold or check if the PDF contains actual table structures.

faq.question: Can I extract from specific pages?
faq.answer: Yes, specify a page range to limit extraction to certain pages.

zh.title: 从PDF提取表格
zh.metaDescription: 检测并从PDF文档中提取表格。导出为JSON、Markdown或CSV格式。
zh.description:
从PDF提取表格检测PDF文档中的表格数据并以结构化格式导出。选择JSON用于数据集成，Markdown用于文档，或CSV用于电子表格。

该工具使用智能检测算法来识别表格结构，即使在复杂文档中也是如此。指定页面范围并调整检测参数以获得最佳结果。

所有处理都在您的浏览器本地进行，确保您的文档保持私密。

howToUse.title: 上传PDF文件
howToUse.description: 上传包含要提取表格的PDF。

howToUse.title: 配置检测
howToUse.description: 设置页面范围和最小列/行阈值。

howToUse.title: 导出并下载
howToUse.description: 选择输出格式（JSON/Markdown/CSV）并下载。

useCases.title: 数据分析
useCases.description: 提取表格数据以在电子表格或数据库中进行分析。

useCases.title: 报告处理
useCases.description: 从PDF报告中提取表格以进行进一步处理。

useCases.title: 文档
useCases.description: 将PDF表格转换为Markdown用于技术文档。

faq.question: 可以检测复杂表格吗？
faq.answer: 该工具最适合简单的网格表格。复杂的合并单元格可能需要手动调整。

faq.question: 如果找不到表格怎么办？
faq.answer: 尝试调整最小列/行阈值或检查PDF是否包含实际的表格结构。

faq.question: 可以从特定页面提取吗？
faq.answer: 是的，指定页面范围以将提取限制在某些页面。

en.title: PDF Layer Manager (OCG)
en.metaDescription: Manage PDF layers (Optional Content Groups). View, toggle, add, delete, and rename layers in your PDF documents.
en.description:
PDF Layer Manager allows you to view and manage Optional Content Groups (OCG) in your PDF documents. OCG layers are used in technical drawings, maps, and complex documents to organize content into toggleable layers.

View all layers in your PDF, toggle their visibility, add new layers, delete unwanted ones, or rename existing layers. This tool is essential for working with layered PDFs like architectural plans, CAD exports, and print-ready documents.

All processing happens locally in your browser, ensuring your documents remain private and secure.

howToUse.title: Upload Your PDF
howToUse.description: Upload a PDF file that contains layers (OCG) or one you want to add layers to.

howToUse.title: View Layers
howToUse.description: The tool automatically lists all layers found in the document with their visibility status.

howToUse.title: Manage Layers
howToUse.description: Toggle layer visibility, rename layers, add new ones, or delete unwanted layers.

howToUse.title: Save and Download
howToUse.description: Download your modified PDF with the layer changes applied.

useCases.title: Technical Drawings
useCases.description: Manage layers in CAD exports to show/hide dimensions, annotations, or different views.

useCases.title: Map Editing
useCases.description: Toggle different map layers like topography, roads, and labels for custom map prints.

useCases.title: Print Preparation
useCases.description: Prepare layered PDFs for printing by toggling appropriate layers for different versions.

faq.question: What are PDF layers (OCG)?
faq.answer: Optional Content Groups (OCG) are layers in a PDF that can be shown or hidden. They are commonly used in CAD drawings, maps, and complex documents.

faq.question: Why does my PDF show no layers?
faq.answer: Not all PDFs contain layers. Layers are typically added during PDF creation from design software or CAD applications.

faq.question: Will layer changes affect the original content?
faq.answer: Layer visibility changes only affect what is displayed or printed. The actual content remains in the document.

zh.title: PDF图层管理器
zh.metaDescription: 管理PDF图层。查看、切换、添加、删除和重命名图层。
zh.description: 管理PDF文档中的可选内容组（OCG）。

howToUse.title: 查看图层
howToUse.description: 工具自动列出所有图层。

howToUse.title: 管理图层
howToUse.description: 切换、添加或删除图层。

useCases.description: 管理CAD导出中的图层。

useCases.description: 切换地图图层。

useCases.title: 印刷准备
useCases.description: 准备分层PDF进行打印。

faq.question: 什么是PDF图层？
faq.answer: OCG是PDF中可以显示或隐藏的图层。

faq.question: 为什么没有图层？
faq.answer: 并非所有PDF都包含图层。

faq.question: 会影响原始内容吗？
faq.answer: 图层可见性更改仅影响显示。

en.title: PDF Reader
en.metaDescription: Free online PDF reader. View, navigate, zoom, rotate, and print PDF documents directly in your browser.
en.description:
PDF Reader is a full-featured PDF viewer that lets you read and navigate PDF documents directly in your browser. No software installation required - just upload your PDF and start reading.

Navigate between pages, zoom in and out, rotate the view, and use fullscreen mode for distraction-free reading. You can also print documents or download them for offline access.

All viewing happens locally in your browser. Your documents are never uploaded to any server, ensuring complete privacy.

howToUse.title: Open Your PDF
howToUse.description: Click to upload or drag and drop a PDF file to open it in the reader.

howToUse.title: Navigate Pages
howToUse.description: Use the page controls to go to the previous or next page, or jump to a specific page number.

howToUse.title: Adjust View
howToUse.description: Zoom in or out, rotate the view, or enter fullscreen mode for comfortable reading.

howToUse.title: Print or Download
howToUse.description: Print the document or download it for offline access when needed.

useCases.title: Document Review
useCases.description: Quickly review PDF documents without installing any software.

useCases.title: Mobile Reading
useCases.description: Read PDF documents on any device with a web browser.

useCases.title: Quick Preview
useCases.description: Preview PDFs before deciding to download or print them.

faq.question: Is my document secure?
faq.answer: Yes, your document is processed entirely in your browser and is never uploaded to any server.

faq.question: Can I annotate or edit the PDF?
faq.answer: This tool is for viewing only. Use our Sign PDF or Annotate PDF tools for editing.

faq.question: Does it work on mobile devices?
faq.answer: Yes, the PDF Reader works on all devices with a modern web browser.
